title: Aggregating board data
excerpt: I am a very new user and trying to understand if a dashboard can aggregate data from multiple boards across workspaces. Essentially I am trying to decide if it is best to set up a client as a workspace or a folder within…

posts.author: MelissaT (melissa thompson)
posts.cookedHtml: I am a very new user and trying to understand if a dashboard can aggregate data from multiple boards across workspaces. Essentially I am trying to decide if it is best to set up a client as a workspace or a folder within a workspace.

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaT

Usually we set up our client management boards within one workspace under different folders linking up to a high-level overview board and dashboard.

If you’re needing assistance setting this up, I would be happy to have a complimentary discovery call with you.

You can book in a session with me via this [link].

I hope to chat with you soon.

Many thanks,
Amber | +64 8 7170 5246 | amber@upstreamtech.io

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaT ,

How did you go with the set up?

Thanks
Amber

posts.author: MelissaT (melissa thompson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Amber

Thank you for your assistance, I found another thread where someone always set up clients as separate workspaces, but we have 80+ clients and that method might be a bit messy so I will follow your lead.

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaT ,

Yes I agree, setting up 80+ workspaces for each client wouldn’t be the most efficient. I hope the high-level / low-level board management works out for you. Folders are really useful in keeping data clean and organised. I’m here ready to support if you need.

You can book in with me anytime here [link].

Many thanks,
Amber | +64 8 7170 5246 | amber@upstreamtech.io

posts.author: MelissaT (melissa thompson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Amber

Thank you – much appreciated!
